name: expense-tracker
description: AI-powered expense tracker — run both frontend and backend with one command

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
